body: Hey Amara, hope you're doing well! I wanted to reach out because we've been seeing a lot of deal flow in the climate infrastructure space lately and a few of the companies crossing my desk feel like they might be better fits for an earlier-stage check than what [Sequoia](orgs/sequoia) typically writes at this point. I know [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been active at seed and Series A in this space, so I thought it might be worth a conversation to see if there's any overlap or opportunity to collaborate on a few of these. One in particular is a grid-edge software company out of Austin that I think has real legs but is probably 12-18 months away from being ready for us. Would love to grab 30 minutes this week or next if you have availability — happy to send a Calendly or just find time directly if that's easier.
